ab: ’inavayan! harem kana wari, kuy adayaw mu papiya, yawa ta kiwmaumalra kana dawdawan i dekalr
ch: A:大家好，我今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m going to take you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ch: B:好喔!我們要練習跟耆老說建和語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to practice speaking Kasavakan with the seniors.
A: Are we almost there?
B: We’re almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: yi! sayhu mu temarakasavakan kuwayu! kana ’inava yi!
ch: B:你們會說建和語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:You guys speak Kasavakan! That’s great!

ab: ’inavayan, harem kana wari, kuy adayaw mu papiya, yawa ta kikaruna kana dawa i ’uma.
ch: A:大家好，老師我今天要帶你們大家去小米田工作。
en: A: Hello, teacher, today I’m going to take you all to work in millet fields.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: kadika kani uwayar papiya, ikalaalup minada kananmu adain.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好要帶的東西。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring what you need.

ab: ai, sinsi, piya mi lra melak kananiyam vakis di capcapan.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好水桶和趕鳥器了。
en: B: Yes, teacher, we’ve got our buckets and bird catchers.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ’inavayan! yawa ta i tonguyuén harem kana wari.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: wa! kana ’inava yi! kakuda ta mukuwa?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: anlra! mayara ta papiya, cacima’ ta lra kimpu harem.
ch: A:走吧！我們大家排好隊，我們現在要買票了。
en: A:Let’s go! Let’s all get in line. We need to buy tickets now.
B: Yes.

ab: i nganguwayan mu, mau na ’aya’ayam, i likudan mu, mau na unaunan, uwa karena’uwi inmu papiya.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己去參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: Teacher, I’m afraid of snakes.
A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: nu saya lra tuki mu, uvuliyas muduwaduka ta kani.
ch: A:我們一個小時後，回頭來這裡集合。
en: A: We’ll meet back here in an hour.
B: Yes teacher, thank you!

ab: mena’u u da eman kanini na wari?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: mena’u ku da sadu a unan di sadu a ’aya’ayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: ngarayaw ku diya. rapi’ ku kuwi.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: kaduwan na pakulalima na cau kani a.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: asavak na danum kadu, pakulima ta kani maruwa lra.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
